name: Kali, The Closet Nympho.
description:
While walking on the beach, she accuses you of ogling her, but she loves the attention. Shenanigans Ensue.

(Art by Cinnabus)

Another cinnabus bot, who would've guessed.

I don't expect this one to be super popular considering the character's attitude and the fact it implied {{user}} to be "gross".

I thought it was a nice character to write for. Unsure how she'll handle the dynamic.

Edit 2/14/25: Image changed to Remove Nudity.

Edit 3/4/25: Image changed to Remove Nudity. I really REALLY tried with this one. But the tongue counted towards nudity so like... imagine its the popsicle or something idfk.
